features: HAIR STYLER - Our Enliven Hair Gel range allows you to style your hair your way! This gel is ideal for both men and women who want to create a standout look.
PRO-VITAMIN B5 - Provides your scalp with all the essential nutrients it needs to stimulate healthy hair growth
CREATE YOUR STYLE - Our Enliven Hair Gel range can meet all your styling needs - whether it's a wet look or an extreme hold, we've got you covered!
UK PRODUCED - All our products are manufactured in our own factory in Worcestershire, helping us keep our carbon footprint low.
ENLIVEN RANGE - Our full Enliven range covers everything from hand wash, to hair gel to fragrance mist! Our Luxe range delivers beautful shower gels, shampoos and body lotion…Enliven has you covered.
